title: HCP Rx — Healthcare Practitioner Chatbot
desc: Developed a medical chatbot for USA healthcare practitioners using LangGraph and FastAPI to handle multi-turn AI workflows and decision-making. Implemented a memory system using Redis for short-term and long-term conversation retention.
impact: Integrated Qdrant Vector Database with OpenAI Embeddings for document retrieval alongside OracleDB for structured data.

title: Adhikademy — AI LMS Application
desc: Built a Learning Management System (LMS) featuring a course assistant chatbot powered by the OpenAI API and vector embeddings in PostgreSQL. Capstone project demonstrating full-stack AI integration.
impact: Configured file storage pipelines using AWS S3 to manage and secure learning materials and assets.

title: LYDO Mariveles — Youth Development Platform
desc: Created a community platform for the Local Youth Development Office using a Laravel backend and a React frontend. Integrated the Google Gemini API to automatically analyze feedback and responses collected from Google Forms.
impact: Automated feedback analysis for a local government youth office, reducing manual review time.
